title: Donadus

'''Donadus''' was an astronomical object<ref name="HuntWithin1" /> located in the [[Donadus system/Legends|Donadus system]], a part of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim's]] [[Bamula sector/Legends|Bamula sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It shared its name with the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Donadi]].<ref name="BtS">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref>

The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group<ref name="EOTE">[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]]</ref> known as the [[Chorran shipjacker]]s operated out of Donadus.<ref name="HuntWithin1" /> At some point between [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]] and [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin2|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2}} establishes that [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] became a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] at some point between the [[assault on Doniphon]] and the [[attack on Anglebay Station]]. The scenario also dates the latter conflict to a few [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Since {{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-11-serving-the-empire|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 11: Serving the Empire}} dates the assault on [[Doniphon]] to [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], Valance must therefore have become a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] at some point between those two dates.</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] led a group of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] in routing the Donadus-based pirates, a mission that helped Valance attain the status of an elite [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]].<ref name="HuntWithin1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Donadus was first mentioned in "[[The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 1]]," a [[Wizards.com]] [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] article containing "Mission 1: Raid on Picutorion," a scenario for use with the [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Star Wars Miniatures|''Star Wars'' Miniatures]] game. The article was authored by [[Jason Fry]] and published on [[December 2]], [[2004]].<ref name="HuntWithin1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Donadus [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Donadus, within grid square J-13.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
